mapper.sql: id, object_name, url, thumbnail_url, size_bytes, width, height, content_type, hash, uploader, created_at
i.id, i.object_name, i.url, i.thumbnail_url, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height, i.content_type, i.hash, i.uploader, i.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM image i INNER JOIN vehicle_image vi ON vi.image_id = i.id WHERE vi.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} ORDER BY vi.sort_order ASC, i.id DESC
SELECT FROM image i ORDER BY i.created_at DESC, i.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE image SET object_name = #{objectName}, url = #{url}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, size_bytes = #{sizeBytes}, width = #{width}, height = #{height}, content_type = #{mimeType}, hash = #{hash}, uploader = #{uploadUser} WHERE id = #{id}
